name: Ghost Town Village
owner: Ghost Town Adventures as of May 2018
description: Ghost Town Village (formerly "Ghost Town in the Sky at Ghost Mountain Park") is an abandoned Wild West-themed amusement park in Maggie Valley, North Carolina, United States whose status is currently, as of March 2023, the subject of an ongoing lawsuit.  It sits atop Buck Mountain, with a top elevation of 4650 ft.  Ghost Town was promoted as "North Carolina's mile-high theme park.
